examples.title: Some Examples
examples.example3: "蟹 + (Select All) Grade" uses Xie rime group grades 1, 2, 3, 4 for analysis ("-" means match all, Middle Chinese category required after "-")
examples.example4: "次浊 + (Select All) Tone" uses voiced aspirated initials + level, rising, departing, entering tones for analysis.
examples.example5: "宕 江" uses merged Dang and Jiang rime groups for analysis (space means analyze together, Enter means treat as different features)
examples.example6: "庄組" uses Zhuang group for analysis (if only "庄" is entered, Zhuang initial will be used).
examples.example7: "流開一" uses Liu rime group open mouth grade 1 characters for analysis.
examples.example8: "假 + 知組 章組" uses Jia rime group's Zhi and Zhang groups for analysis.
examples.example10: "(Select All) Place" analyzes all articulation places, including "labiodental, glottal, retroflex, palatal, velar, bilabial, dental".

she.values: 通、宕、江、止、遇、蟹、流、山、效、咸、深、臻、曾、梗、果、假

yun.values: 之、仙、佳、侯、侵、元、先、冬、凡、刪、咍、咸、唐、嚴、夬、宵、寒、尤、山、幽、庚、廢、微、支、文、東、模、欣、歌、江、泰、添、灰、痕、登、皆、真、祭、耕、肴、脂、臻、蒸、蕭、虞、覃、談、豪、銜、鍾、陽、青、魂、魚、鹽、麻、齊、#清(清有歧義，需用#指定清韻)

deng.values: 一、二、三、三A、三B、三C、三銳、四 (enter "三" to include all third-division syllables; specify "ABC銳" to distinguish chongniu, for example "三A")

buwei.values: 雙唇、齒、唇齒、喉、捲舌、腭、軟腭

zu.values: 幫、非、端、泥、精、莊、知、章、見、曉、影、日

mu.values: 幫、滂、並、明、非、敷、奉、微、端、透、定、泥、知、徹、澄、娘、精、從、心、邪、莊、初、崇、俟、生、章、昌、常、書、日、船、見、溪、群、疑、影、曉、匣、云、以、來、@清(清有歧義，需用@指定清母)

notes.note2: In the analysis results, blue text like this is clickable.
notes.note3: Click to select features in a popup, then generate a new window for detailed query.
notes.note4: Such windows can be generated infinitely (if your browser can handle it), allowing simultaneous comparison of multiple locations/features.
notes.note5: ✔ Note 1: Mobile interface may not display fully, please scroll/drag more.
notes.note6: ✔ Note 2: Click the Partition ▼ button to open partition popup, users can click to select desired partition. To display next level partition:
notes.note7: ※ Desktop: just move cursor to the corresponding partition;
notes.note8: ※ Mobile: need to click arrow ⌵ for corresponding partition
notes.note9: Click 🎲 to randomly generate analysis examples
